sections.paragraph:
ἀφθονία, ας, ἡ (s. φθονέω; Pind.+; POslo 78, 16 [136 a.d.=‘abundance’]; OdeSol 11:6; TestAbr A 4 p. 80, 20 [Stone p. 8] al.; Philo, Mos. 1, 6; Jos., Bell. 3, 505, Ant. 12, 133; Just., A II, 7, 3) ‘freedom fr. envy’, hence willingness (so Pla., Prot. 327b) Tit 2:7 v.l.—Sv.—DELG s.v. φθόνος.

Pind Pind , V b.c.—List 5

POslo POslo = Papyri Osloenses—List 4

OdeSol OdeSol = Gk. Ode of Solomon 11: PBodmer XI; III a.d.—List 2

TestAbr TestAbr = Testament of Abraham, with some interpolations; I b.c./I a.d.—Lists 2, 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

  1. fr. = from

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 156
